briefs.title: Council to Consider: Optional $193,000 Increase to BAH Program Contract
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on an optional contract change that would add $193,000 — a 3.8% increase — to the existing BAH Program service contract, bringing the total estimated contract value to $807,000 over four years.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision on February 10, 2026 — this contract change could affect related service providers.

key_dates.label: Burnaby BAH Program optional contract change — council vote
Burnaby BAH Program Contract Renewal #3 — term ends
